faq.question: What should I do if the logs show unrecognised program keys?
faq.answer: When the plugin encounters appliance programs or settings that are not yet known to its internal database, it outputs a block of TypeScript code to the log annotated with `(unrecognised)`. This typically occurs when a new appliance model is released or Home Connect updates their API with new functionality. To ensure these programs are properly supported, please open a GitHub issue and provide the complete block of code from the log. This allows the maintainer to add the missing definitions in a future release.
faq.semantic_abstract: The plugin identifies and logs undocumented Home Connect API program keys and options as unrecognised TypeScript snippets to facilitate feature discovery. Reporting these log outputs via GitHub issues allows for the manual integration of new appliance features into the plugin's internal definitions.
